summary: Complete testing of Phase 4 (Flujo de Caja Gerencial) and Phase 5 (Rentabilidad). Backend: 17/17 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All UI elements verified - KPIs, charts, tables, filter controls, and sidebar navigation working correctly.

issues: Recharts console warning about chart dimensions when container has no data - cosmetic only, not a functional issue

backend_api.GET /api/flujo-caja-gerencial?agrupacion: PASS - Returns timeline with totales (ingresos=1850, egresos=1100, flujo_neto=750)
backend_api.flujo-caja-gerencial timeline item struc: PASS - All 9 fields present (periodo, ingresos_ventas, cobranzas_cxc, total_ingresos, egresos_gastos, pagos_cxp, total_egresos, flujo_neto, saldo_acumulado)
backend_api.flujo-caja-gerencial totales calculation: PASS - Sum of timeline matches totales
backend_api.GET /api/rentabilidad?dimension=marca: PASS - Returns data with ingreso/gasto/utilidad/margen per marca (ELEMENT PREMIUM S/647.48)
backend_api.GET /api/rentabilidad?dimension=proyecto: PASS - Returns empty data gracefully with zero totales
backend_api.rentabilidad data item structure: PASS - All 5 fields present (dimension, ingreso, gasto, utilidad, margen_pct)
backend_api.rentabilidad totales calculation: PASS - Sum of items matches totales, utilidad = ingreso - gasto

frontend_ui.Flujo de Caja page title: PASS - 'Flujo de Caja' with subtitle 'Ingresos, egresos y saldo acumulado por periodo'
frontend_ui.Flujo de Caja 3 KPI cards: PASS - Total Ingresos (green), Total Egresos (red), Flujo Neto (conditional color)
frontend_ui.Flujo de Caja ComposedChart: PASS - Bars for Ingresos (green) and Egresos (red), Line for Saldo Acumulado (blue)
frontend_ui.Flujo de Caja detail table columns: PASS - All 9 columns: Periodo, Ventas, Cobranzas, Total Ingresos, Gastos, Pagos CxP, Total Egresos, Flujo Neto, Saldo Acum.
frontend_ui.Flujo de Caja refresh button: PASS - Actualizar button visible and functional
frontend_ui.Rentabilidad page title: PASS - 'Rentabilidad' with subtitle 'Ingreso vs Gasto por [dimension]'
frontend_ui.Rentabilidad 4 KPI cards: PASS - Ingreso Total (green), Gasto Total (red), Utilidad (conditional), Margen (blue %)
frontend_ui.Rentabilidad dimension selector: PASS - All 4 options work: Marca, Linea de Negocio, Centro de Costo, Proyecto
frontend_ui.Rentabilidad BarChart: PASS - Bars for Ingreso (green), Gasto (red), Utilidad (dark green/orange)
frontend_ui.Rentabilidad detail table columns: PASS - All 5 columns: Marca/dimension name, Ingreso, Gasto, Utilidad, Margen %

design_review.KPI cards: PASS - Good contrast, proper font weights and sizes
design_review.Tables: PASS - Proper alignment (monetary columns right-aligned), footer totals styled
design_review.Sidebar navigation: PASS - Clean section grouping with expandable headers

test_credentials.test_data: 1 confirmed POS sale for ELEMENT PREMIUM (S/ 647.48), CxC/CxP test records, pago records

seed_data_creation: None - used existing data from previous iterations
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 4 (Flujo de Caja Gerencial) and Phase 5 (Rentabilidad) fully tested and working. Backend endpoints in /app/backend/routers/finanzas_gerencial.py. Flujo de Caja aggregates from cont_pago_aplicacion (ingresos), cont_pago (egresos), cont_cxc_abono (cobranzas), and cont_cxp_abono (pagos CxP) with diario/semanal/mensual grouping. Rentabilidad queries odoo.v_pos_line_full joined with cont_venta_pos_estado for confirmed POS sales by marca, and cont_gasto_linea for gastos. Real data shows ELEMENT PREMIUM brand with S/ 647.48 ingreso (100% margen since no gastos). Frontend pages use recharts (ComposedChart for flujo, BarChart for rentabilidad). Sidebar has 'Finanzas Gerenciales' section with both pages.
